channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US-Iran tensions escalate with renewed strikes and diplomatic talks continue
item.description: The United States has intensified military actions against Iran, marking a renewed phase of conflict in the Middle East. President Donald Trump asserted that Iran 'will be defeated soon' following a s...

item.title: David Bowie's 1965 Unreleased Tracks to Be Released with Shel Talmy
item.description: A new album titled 'David Bowie: The Shel Talmy Recordings' is set to be released on September 18 via Parlophone, featuring ten previously unheard tracks from David Bowie's early career in 1965. Recor...

item.title: Persistent air quality issues in southwestern Ontario
item.description: The article highlights ongoing air quality concerns in southwestern Ontario, emphasizing the impact of industrial activity and weather patterns on local residents. It mentions elevated pollution level...

item.title: Ex-Aso Villa Chaplain's Death Sparks National Mournings as CAN Honors Legacy
item.description: Rev. Dr. William Uzochukwu Okoye, former Aso Rock Villa Chaplain and founder of All Christians Fellowship Mission, has passed away, leaving a void in Nigeria's Christian community. The Christian Assoc...

item.title: Sen. Dick Durbin Criticizes DOJ Official's Excuses and Trump's Election Claims
item.description: Senator Dick Durbin (D-IL) criticized Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche during a conversation with CNN anchor John Berman, accusing him of providing a 'baloney' excuse for avoiding meetings with Ep...

item.title: Sheryl Gabriella Announces Final Move to Gated Estate in Kenya
item.description: Kenyan content creator Sheryl Gabriella has shared updates about her latest lifestyle change, revealing she's settled into a new home within a gated estate. The move comes after months of speculation ...

item.title: Legal Process and Accountability in Nigeria's Anti-Corruption Efforts
item.description: The article discusses the legal journey of Ibrahim Magu, former head of the Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC), who was suspended without charge in 2020 amid allegations of misconduct. Hi...

item.title: Yard Act's Third Album Blends Post-Punk and Rap in a Genre-Bending Masterpiece
item.description: Yard Act’s third album, ‘You’re Gonna Need A Little Music,’ marks a significant evolution in their sound, blending post-punk with rap and garage-rock elements. After building their own studio space to...

item.title: US House Rejects Bid to Cut Israel Aid Amid Democratic Divide
item.description: The US House of Representatives rejected an amendment to cut off aid to Israel on Wednesday, with the vote splitting along party lines. The measure, proposed by Republican Representative Thomas Massie...

item.title: Projected Fuel Price Cuts in August Despite Oil Market Volatility
item.description: The article discusses anticipated fuel price reductions in South Africa for August, influenced by earlier dips in global oil prices and a relatively strong rand. Despite renewed tensions in the Middle...

item.title: Siya Goyal's Father Clarifies FDA Shop Action Amid Legal Controversy
item.description: Praveen Goyal, father of accused murderer Siya Goyal, clarified that his dry fruits and spices shop in Market Yard was not sealed by Maharashtra FDA officials. The FDA had collected samples from the s...

item.title: U.S.-Iran escalation: Naval blockade tensions and regional strikes
item.description: The United States has escalated its military operations against Iran, targeting infrastructure and vessels in the Persian Gulf as part of an ongoing conflict. U.S. forces disabled a ship accused of at...

item.title: Senate Impeachment Court to Address Sara Duterte's Alleged Misuse of Confidential Funds
item.description: The Philippine Palace expressed hope that the Senate impeachment court will address Vice President Sara Duterte's alleged misuse of P612.5 million in confidential funds without drama or concealment of...

item.title: Federal High Court Denies Bail to Man Accused of Planning School Attacks in Abuja
item.description: The Federal High Court in Abuja has denied bail to John Jude Agbo, who was arrested by the Department of State Services (DSS) for allegedly planning multiple attacks on schools in the Federal Capital ...

item.title: R. Kelly files request to commute 30-year sentence for racketeering and sex trafficking
item.description: R. Kelly, the convicted sex offender, has formally requested Donald Trump to commute his 30-year prison sentence for racketeering and sex trafficking charges. The request, made public this week, is li...

item.title: Tanzanian Playwright Gloria Majule's Play Recognized with New York Billboards
item.description: Tanzanian playwright and screenwriter Gloria Majule is gaining international recognition after her award-winning play 'Malaria' received widespread acclaim. Promotional billboards featuring her work n...

item.title: Trump's Primetime Address and the Election Integrity Controversy
item.description: Thom Hartmann analyzes Donald Trump's upcoming primetime speech, which will focus on declassified intelligence about 2020 election vulnerabilities and alleged foreign hacking of voting machines. The a...

item.title: Senate Leader Responds to Obstruction of Justice Allegations Over Senator's Departure
item.description: Senate Minority Leader Alan Peter Cayetano has submitted his formal response to an obstruction of justice complaint filed against him regarding the departure of Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa from th...

item.title: Gungahlin Eagles pay tribute to club legend Greg Newham after his passing from brain cancer
item.description: The Gungahlin Eagles rugby club is mourning the loss of one of its most beloved figures, Greg Newham, who passed away earlier this week after battling glioblastoma, an aggressive form of brain cancer....

item.title: Karoooos Cartrack Reports Record Subscriber Growth and Profit Boost in FY2027
item.description: Karoooos, a Singapore-based group owning Cartrack and Karoooos Logistics, reported record subscriber growth for its vehicle tracking business in FY2027. Cartrack's subscriber base grew 18% to over 2.8...
